title: gymnopteris auriculata
intro: Gymnopteris auriculata, also known as the auriculated glade fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it is used in Ayurvedic medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and enhancing respiratory function. Gymnopteris auriculata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also dried and used in traditional remedies.
